mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_order_summary (tenant_id, business_context, summary_date, currency, order_count, total_amount, last_event_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{businessContext}, #{summaryDate}, #{currency}, 1, #{amount}, #{lastEventAt}, now()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, business_context, summary_date, currency) DO UPDATE SET order_count = daily_order_summary.order_count + 1, total_amount = daily_order_summary.total_amount + EXCLUDED.total_amount, last_event_at = GREATEST(daily_order_summary.last_event_at, EXCLUDED.last_event_at), updated_at = now()
